svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="mcp" name="MCP"> <mxGraphModel dx="1758" dy="933" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="userInput" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" value="User Input" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="110" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="systemPrompt" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;container=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="System prompt" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="190" x="340" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="instructions" parent="systemPrompt" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" value="Instructions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="37.86" width="77.19" x="56.41" y="32.14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="toolDesc" parent="systemPrompt" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#cfe2f3;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" value="Tool Description" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="43.57" width="77.19" x="56.41" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="message" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" value="Message" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="280" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="llm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8dff5;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="LLM" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="100" x="120" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="toolCallJson" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" value="Tool call json" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="280" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcpServer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=12;" value="MCP Server<br>tool1 / tool2 / tool3 / ..." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="220" x="490" y="415" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="toolCallResult" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9ead3;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" value="Tool call result" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="280" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="finalResult" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" value="Final Result" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="280" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="userInput" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" target="message"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="190" y="270" /> <mxPoint x="330" y="270" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="systemPrompt" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" target="message"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="440" y="270" /> <mxPoint x="330" y="270" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="message" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;entryX=0.999;entryY=0.11;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" target="llm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="llm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;exitX=1.021;exitY=0.358;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" target="toolCallJson"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="toolCallJson" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" target="mcpServer"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="480" y="435" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="435" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="mcpServer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" target="toolCallResult"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="480" y="525" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="525" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="llm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.906;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" target="finalResult"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="220" y="615" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="toolDesc" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;fontStyle=2;fontSize=10;" target="mcpServer" value="提供工具结构化文本描述"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="600" y="170" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AzWM0ZHT2YdFzkJlcd6P-1" edge="1" parent="1" source="toolCallResult" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;entryX=1.004;entryY=0.64;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="llm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="310" y="370" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="250" y="370" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
